title: FurSky Reborn
description: Hypixel Skyblock's most popular resource pack. Now available for 1.21.11!
body:
___

Hypixel Skyblock's most popular texture pack, texturing almost every item in the game and made by a team of talented volunteers. Now available for 1.21.11!

**REQUIRES CATHARSIS** to work at all! Do not use Optifine.
___

The pack now has only one version! Using Catharsis, you can customise the pack and choose which textures you want to use, and which ones you dont!
___

If you have any issues or suggestions regarding the pack, please tell us in our [Discord](discord.gg/fsr)!
